site.title: Andres Ortega
site.tagline: Platform Engineer | Kubestronaut | CKA | CKAD | CKS

about: Platform Engineer with deep expertise in high-security, large-scale Kubernetes infrastructure. Transitioned from MLOps — now building and hardening platforms that meet the demands of modern enterprises.
Kubestronaut — CNCF's highest Kubernetes distinction. Also CKA, CKAD, CKS, KCNA, KCSA certified.
Background in ML pipeline automation, solar energy data analytics, and oilfield engineering. Fluent in Spanish, English, and German.
Also running a 4-node k3s homelab with GitOps (ArgoCD), Longhorn, and Cloudflare Tunnel — because production should feel like home.

highlights: Manage and optimize Kubernetes clusters in high-security, large-scale infrastructure environments
Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines ensuring stability, scalability, and compliance
Build robust internal platforms empowering teams to deploy efficiently and effectively
Developed ML models for solar energy data analysis and automation
Built and scaled data pipelines for energy monitoring systems
Analyzed solar energy production data across large-scale photovoltaic installations
Developed Python-based tools for automated reporting and visualization
Improved data quality and processing pipelines for energy monitoring
Generated models for reduction of corrective maintenance using neural networks
Prepared data analysis for WindPool stakeholders
Developed Python scripts for data mining and database labeling
Provided engineering support and managed field operations for oilfield fluid services
Managed inventories and supervised field personnel

publications.title: Evaluation of Anomaly Detection of an Autoencoder Based on Maintenance Information and SCADA-Data
